arts.ttl: FIVE names Man Utd want to replace Rashford with
arts.sum: Manchester United have drawn up a list of five names they wish to replace Marcus Rashford with, according to reports. “There is so much to improve,” Amorim admitted when asked about Rashford after Man Utd's win against Everton.

arts.ttl: Ashworth Man Utd exit 'not best situation' - Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim says Dan Ashworth's shock exit is "not the best situation" but believes the club's vision remains clear and unaffected.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher picks who truly has the greater achievements out of Sir Alex Ferguson or Pep Guardiola
Alphonso Davies: Man Utd and Real Madrid’s transfer prospects as shock suitor revealed
arts.sum: Real Madrid have been long-time leaders in seeking to sign Davies as a free agent to solve a long-standing issue at left-back, but lately Man Utd have emerged as a serious threat while Bayern Munich’s hopes of renewing his deal have been boosted. Alphonso Davies ’ future is becoming clearer, with major updates on the transfer rumours linking him to both Manchester United and Real Madrid, who are hopeful of prising him away from Bayern Munich as a free agent in the summer.

arts.ttl: Goal-scoring wing-back becomes top Man Utd transfer target but Chelsea also keen on £30m man
arts.sum: Manchester United’s new manager Ruben Amorim is known for his 3-4-3 formation that makes use of wing-backs, so it’s not too surprising to see the club now shopping for that kind of player.
